footer.brandDesc: Having supports sourcing, distribution, and export/import coordination across cosmetic ingredients, fragrances, finished products, and OEM/ODM sectors.
footer.tagline: K-Beauty sourcing, export/import coordination & domestic distribution
cookie.text: We use essential cookies to run this site and, with your consent, analytics cookies to improve our services.
mega.ingredients.desc: High-functional cosmetic ingredients and bioactive materials
mega.fragrance.desc: Customized fragrance solutions and perfumery consulting
mega.finished.desc: Global beauty brand portfolios and OEM/ODM planning
mega.about.desc: Company overview and our global partnership network
mega.sustainability.desc: Transparent trade principles and responsible supply chain management
lead.hero.desc: Discover our founder's message and the core philosophy that drives Having.
lead.ceo.h2:
Moving forward with a clear vision
and a people-centric philosophy.
lead.sign.name: James Choi
lead.msg1: Having was founded with a definitive goal: to become the most trusted partner in beauty ingredient sourcing and global supply.
lead.msg2: We have grown by supporting the global expansion of Korean ingredient manufacturers equipped with outstanding technology. Our core mission is to serve as a reliable bridge, enabling leading K-beauty companies to thrive on the broader global stage.
lead.msg3: Alongside this, we discover and supply innovative active materials to help domestic brands and OEM/ODM partners build global competitiveness. By proposing differentiated ingredients, we aim to contribute to the sustainable growth of the beauty industry.
lead.msg4: We strive to stay ahead of fast-changing global trends, becoming a company that beautifies not only the skin but also the world, ultimately creating social value by growing together with people.
lead.philo.statement:
At the heart of every business
are its 'people'.
lead.philo.msg1: Even in an era of advanced technology, we believe the core that completes a business lies in people. As systems advance, the values of mutual trust, accurate judgment, and consideration become even more crucial. This is why Having always puts people first.
lead.philo.msg2: A partnership with Having goes beyond a simple trade transaction; it is an opportunity to secure a stable supply chain and a definitive growth engine in the global market.
about.hero.desc: Having successfully connects domestic beauty companies with global buyers through strategic sourcing, expert export/import coordination, and new market development.
about.s1.h2:
The business hub for
K-Beauty's global leap.
about.s1.lead: Having Corp. is a specialized beauty trade company that creates successful cross-border business by connecting Korean beauty suppliers with global buyers.
about.s2.h2:
Your expert trade partner
completing global beauty business.
about.card1.text: Supply of functional cosmetic ingredients and bioactive materials, alongside professional regulatory documentation support for exports and imports.
about.card2.text: Global fragrance sourcing and perfumery project coordination encompassing beauty, personal care, and lifestyle sectors.
about.card3.text: Discovering competitive Korean beauty brands, global distribution matching, and providing customized OEM/ODM solutions.
about.s3.lead: The footprints of Having's growth into a specialized platform encompassing extensive sourcing and trade coordination in the K-beauty market.
about.tl.2021: Ingredient consulting and global trade strategy development
about.tl.2023: Acceleration of cosmetic ingredient business growth
about.tl.2025: Designated as a Professional Trading Company
about.s4.lead: Through a robust network connecting buyers across various countries with domestic partners, Having builds a practical global trade hub for K-beauty to expand worldwide.
about.cta.title: Start your successful global beauty business.
cta.ph: What products or solutions are you looking for?
about.def.v1: K-beauty sourcing and global trade encompassing cosmetic ingredients, fragrances, and finished products.
about.def.v2: Outstanding domestic and international ingredient suppliers, global fragrance houses, beauty brands, and OEM/ODM manufacturers.
about.def.v3: Global distributors, retailers, clinics, aesthetics, and import partners seeking K-beauty solutions.
about.def.v4: We comprehensively analyze product specs, target markets, distribution channels, and trade conditions to find the perfect fit between suppliers and buyers.
about.tlx.2020: Took the first step as a cosmetic ingredient trade company specialized in developing new global markets.
about.tlx.2021: Supported domestic cosmetic ingredient companies with professional consulting and customized overseas expansion strategies.
about.tlx.2022: Signed partnerships with major overseas companies, laying the foundation for a solid global trade network.
about.tlx.2023: Cosmetic ingredient business entered a full-scale trajectory, surpassing USD 500K in annual performance.
about.tlx.2024: Achieved USD 1M in annual performance, driven by continuous reorders and successful new market development.
about.tlx.2025: Selected as a Professional Trading Company by KITA (Korea International Trade Association), exceeding USD 2.5M in annual performance.
about.tlx.2026: Successfully expanded business areas from ingredients to fragrance and finished product sectors.
frag.hero.title: Fragrance Solutions
frag.hero.desc: Providing world-class perfumery expertise to domestic beauty brands and manufacturers.
frag.s3.h2: Every field where scent becomes business.
frag.s3.lead: From skincare and fine fragrances to home fragrances and scent marketing that fill spaces, we partner with every industry where scent defines the brand experience.
frag.s4.lead: From project planning to mass production, Having professionally coordinates the communication, sampling, regulatory review, and decision-making required for fragrance development.
frag.s5.lead: Based on our expertise in cosmetics and chemistry, we closely manage the entire project process as the most reliable partner in the fragrance business.
frag.s1.p1: Creating a single perfect scent requires a long journey. That journey begins with premium raw materials, the perfumer's expertise, clear creative direction, and a dependable partner.
frag.s1.p2: Having breaks down physical and language barriers between global fragrance houses and Korean beauty companies, overseeing all practical matters to ensure projects proceed swiftly and accurately.
frag.s2.p1: The fragrance industry holds centuries of history, from tradition to modern state-of-the-art scent laboratories. It is a world where rare materials, endless R&D, and perfumers' artistry are integrated.
frag.s2.p2: Having helps domestic companies access this profound world of scent more easily. We connect the exceptional senses of global fragrance suppliers with brands and manufacturers who bring them into consumers' daily lives.
frag.do1.x: We accurately grasp the customer's brand concept and match it with the optimal fragrance partner who can implement it flawlessly.
frag.do2.x: We provide professional documentation guides to meet the cosmetic regulations and fragrance safety standards of the target country.
frag.do3.x: We facilitate accurate and transparent communication without misunderstandings among brands, manufacturers, and fragrance suppliers.
frag.do4.x: We smoothly manage the entire scent development process, from initial sample requests to olfactory evaluation and revision feedback.
frag.do5.x: We closely support detailed technical issues to ensure lab samples are stably materialized into actual mass production.
frag.do6.x: We help launch successful products by analyzing the rapidly changing trends and consumer preferences of the domestic fragrance market.
frag.cta.title: Join Having on the journey to find the perfect scent.
frag.cta.ph: Please briefly describe the fragrance project you are preparing.
frag.s4.h2:
Having's support process
for successful fragrance projects.
frag.s5.h2:
Why Having stands out
in the global fragrance business.
frag.quote: “From concept planning to final production, we take responsibility for every step of our clients' successful fragrance development.”
frag.s2.h2:
The journey of scent begins
long before it reaches the product.
frag.why.v1: Based on a deep understanding of cosmetic ingredients and formulation chemistry, we bring out the perfect harmony between the base formulation and fragrance.
frag.why.v2: We meticulously review whether the intended fragrance complies with IFRA safety standards and the legal regulations of the target market.
frag.why.v3: We propose tailored options for allergen-free fragrances and clean-beauty positioning in line with recent beauty trends.
frag.why.v4: You can resolve the entire process—from supplier sourcing and scent evaluation to regulatory document review and export/import logistics—through Having's one-stop channel.
esg.hero.desc: Responsible global trade principles based on rigorous partner verification, transparent documentation, and trust.
esg.sb.li1: We prioritize discovering suppliers and products that strictly adhere to quality and ethical standards.
esg.sb.li2: We support domestic manufacturers with excellent technology to enter the global market fairly.
esg.sb.li3: We transparently share and thoroughly document the entire process, from initial buyer discovery to final shipment.
esg.sb.para: Having is a sourcing and trade enterprise that does not operate direct manufacturing facilities. Therefore, our sustainability management focuses on the practical realm of building a 'responsible supply chain' by carefully selecting reliable partners, rigorously verifying related documents, and engaging in transparent communication.
esg.s2.lead: Sustainability at Having is not a grandiose slogan. It is deeply embedded in our actual business processes: responsible sourcing, fair market entry support, and transparent trade governance.
esg.s3.lead: Sustainability is a core working method practiced by every member of Having at every moment—when reviewing business opportunities, verifying ingredients, and recording transactions.
esg.s4.lead: As an intermediary connecting suppliers and buyers, we believe that establishing a transparent and systematic trade process is the greatest social responsibility we can fulfill.
esg.stage1.text: We select partners by strictly evaluating ingredient safety, eco-friendly packaging, and regulatory compliance.
esg.stage2.text: We lower the global market entry barriers for small and medium-sized domestic manufacturers through structured global trade support channels.
esg.stage3.text: We build mutual trust through clear information sharing, flawless paperwork, and systematic trade record management.
esg.card1.x: We review target market regulatory compliance, product quality, document readiness, and ethical corporate management from multiple angles.
esg.card2.x: We verify all supporting materials buyers can trust, such as Technical Data Sheets (TDS), official certifications, and Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS).
esg.card3.x: We reasonably coordinate sensitive trade conditions like unit price, MOQ, and production lead times to satisfy both buyers and suppliers.
esg.card4.x: We transparently record and systematically preserve all trade and commercial details to enable immediate and clear tracking if issues arise.
esg.p1.text: The environmental responsibility practiced by Having starts not with vague claims, but with the action of choosing partners and products with eco-friendly and upright philosophies.
esg.p1.li1: When reviewing suppliers, we consider sustainable ingredient usage and eco-friendly packaging application as key evaluation criteria.
esg.p1.li2: We professionally support global buyers' stringent data requests regarding environmental impact assessments and packaging sustainability.
esg.p1.li3: We optimize sourcing and logistics processes to seek transportation methods that minimize carbon emissions.
esg.p2.text: We open doors to new markets. We support highly capable Korean beauty brands and manufacturers in seizing global business opportunities.
esg.p2.li1: Through Having's verified global trade network, we help excellent domestic companies settle into new overseas markets.
esg.p2.li2: We pioneer sales channels by communicating directly with buyers across diverse channels, including global distributors, large retailers, and aesthetic clinics.
esg.p2.li3: We build long-term, robust business partnerships based on mutual trust, rather than simple one-time transactions.
esg.p3.text: Having's governance principles are clear. All transactions must be communicated transparently, perfectly documented, and systematically managed.
esg.p3.li1: We clearly agree on responsibilities, Incoterms, and payment clauses between trading parties early in the business.
esg.p3.li2: We perfectly prepare and coordinate all regulatory documents required for export/import, such as product specs, COA, and certificates of origin.
esg.p3.li3: We foster a safe and reliable trade ecosystem by managing the flow of all transactions with practical and traceable data.
esg.s1.h2:
Sustainability deeply rooted
in our actual
trade practices.
esg.s3.h2:
From initial partner discovery
to final shipment and distribution.
esg.s4.h2:
Transparent and responsible trade
defined by Having.
ing.hero.title: Cosmetic Ingredient Solutions
ing.hero.desc: High-functional actives, biotech materials, and premium base ingredients leading global beauty trends.
index.hero.desc: Having successfully connects Korea's superior cosmetic ingredients, competitive finished products, outstanding OEM/ODM infrastructure, and customized fragrance solutions with buyers worldwide.
index.pillars.title: Having's Three Core Business Areas.
index.card1.name: Cosmetic Ingredients
index.card1.desc: We connect domestic cosmetic ingredient manufacturers with excellent technology to global buyers, fully supporting product sourcing, regulatory documentation, and the entire export/import process.
index.card2.name: Fragrance
index.card2.desc: In collaboration with Payan Bertrand in Grasse, France—the home of perfume—we provide premium fragrance solutions for cosmetics, home fragrance, and fine fragrance development.
index.card3.name: Finished Products
index.card3.desc: We carefully select K-beauty brands with proven market competitiveness, sourcing and supplying them to global distributors, major retailers, clinics, and key e-commerce channels.
index.cta.title: Start your successful K-Beauty business with Having.
index.cta.ph: Feel free to leave your requests for ingredients, products, or collaboration proposals.
index.st.line2: The single perfect partner for global K-Beauty business
inq.hero.desc: Leave us the areas where you need assistance—ingredient sourcing, fragrance development, product distribution, or OEM/ODM—and we will propose optimized solutions and partners tailored to your requirements.
inq.f.name: Name
inq.ph.name: Please enter the contact person's name.
inq.ph.message: Providing detailed information about the products, ingredients, or business proposals you are seeking will enable a faster and more accurate response.
inq.cd.phoneVal: Mentioning 'Website Inquiry' when calling will ensure faster service.
inq.consent: I have fully read the Privacy Policy and consent to the collection and use of minimal personal information (name, email, contact number, company name, inquiry details) required to provide a prompt and accurate response. *
inq.title:
Leave an inquiry, and we will
respond promptly and accurately.
inq.lead: We welcome any inquiries regarding ingredients, products, OEM/ODM production, or fragrances. Leave your business needs, and Having's experts will find the optimal solution and contact you.
inq.note: All inquiries, including sample requests, quotes, and partnership proposals, are carefully reviewed by the respective department and replied to within 1-2 business days after submission.
inq.formNote: * Required fields. Your valuable information is safely used only for inquiry response and business communication purposes, and will be retained for one year after processing in accordance with relevant laws.
